code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  mut sum = 0
  mut buf = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i <= n
    let is_end = i == n
    mut is_space = false
    if not is_end
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          is_space = true
        end
      when None
        is_space = true
      end
    end
    if is_end or is_space
      if not string.is_empty(buf)
        match string.parse_int(buf)
        when Some(v)
          if v > 0
            sum = sum + v * 2
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        buf = ""
      end
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        buf = "#{buf}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("result=#{sum}")
end
